mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_main (order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, shipping_address_id) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{shippingAddressId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_main WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_main SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE order_main SET status = #{status}, paid_at = #{paidAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE order_main SET status = #{status}, logistics_company = #{logisticsCompany}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, shipping_remark = #{shippingRemark}, shipped_at = #{shippedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_main ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM order_main WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id DESC
